product.name: VEVOR 60" Commercial Indoor Air Curtain Super Power 2 Speeds 1500CFM, Wall Mounted Air Curtains for Doors, Indoor Over Door Fan with Heavy Duty Limit Switch, Easy-Install 110V Unheated
product.description: SpecificationsModel: LFM120-1500-UProduct Dimensions: 59.06 x 8.86 x 9.06 inch / 1500 x 225 x 230 mmMax Airflow(CFM/m³/h): 1500/2547Colour: WhiteFit for Door Height: 78.74 - 94.49 inch / 2.0-2.4 mVoltage: AC120V 60HzPackage Content1 x Air Curtain1 x Swing-Type Stroke Switch4 x M4x28 Screws2 x M4x18 Screws6 x M4 Nuts4 x M6x16 Screws2 x M4x36 Wood Screws2 x M4x20 Wood Screws3 x Bracket Plates
features: Powerful Air Curtain: Enjoy a powerful air wall with 1500 CFM, creating a tranquil indoor and outdoor condition. It efficiently eliminates dust and bad smell, providing fresh and clean air during both hot summers and cold winters.

Low-Noise Operation: Operates quietly to ensure a disturbance-free dining experience. Indoors feel like home, with noise levels equivalent to that of a residential setting, allowing you to enjoy a clean and peaceful space.

Two-Speed Settings: Easily switch between two fan speeds to adapt to all seasons. Low speed for energy efficiency and minimal noise, high speed for robust isolation, keeping you cool in the summer and shielding you from the cold in winter. Personalize your air control, all at your fingertips.
Two Magnetic Door Switches: Equipped with two magnetic door switches for hassle-free installation. It accommodates both sliding and swinging doors, ensuring seamless integration into your door frame.

Corrosion Resistance and Rust Prevention: The slim metal body is highly resistant to corrosion and rust. Designed with a corrosion-resistant metal shell and airflow outlet, the large-diameter fan wheel operates quietly and efficiently. Equipped with a pure copper motor for reliable and stable performance.
